body.title: Consequence check: Granny worker registry + CC.0 dispatch
body.result: GRANNY_THROTTLED gone from channel (correct); GRANNY_CC0_OFFER: 0 (CC.0.available.true not set yet — expected; semaphore protocol working). No spurious offers. Effect: clear.
body.description:
**What changed:** Granny gained a config-driven worker registry with availability semaphores; CC.0 receives tickets via tmux send-keys; DickSimnel.0 added as an OR-powered rack device.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- CC.0 receives send-keys while mid-conversation (Akien forgot to remove CC.0.available.true) — unintended sprint starts
- DickSimnel.0 orphaned: started but DickSimnel.0.available.true never dropped, Granny dispatches to a dead channel receiver
- granny.queue.available.false left present after manual pause, silently blocking all dispatch indefinitely
- Config reader fails on malformed granny.yaml — Granny falls back to no workers, tickets queue indefinitely with no alert
- in_progress query slow on large queue — poll cycle timeout under load

**Signals to watch:** GRANNY_CC0_OFFER in channel when it should not appear; GRANNY_THROTTLED disappears (expected); dispatch cycle time in _push_stats; channel silence when queue is non-empty

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-16 or when first CC.0 offer is received in production.

**Worst-case token spend:**
  - Per-failure cost: one unintended CC sprint ~100k-200k tokens ($0.30-0.60 at Sonnet 4.6); one DickSimnel OR iteration ~10k-50k tokens (negligible)
  - Hard cap: max_concurrent=1 in config; semaphore interlock requires CC.0.available.true (Akien-controlled); no hard token cap in code for OR workers
  - Blast radius: one ticket at a time; Granny checks in_progress before re-offering; no loop; worst case is one unintended sprint

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** no automated verification — observation ticket; done when predicted effects are annotated as occurred / clear / partial and ticket is closed
